instruction: The cube icon is missing a yellow star stamp. Add one back in the top-left (polygon at x≈20, y≈22, fill #fde047).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cube.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m21 7.5-9-5.25L3 7.5m18 0-9 5.25m9-5.25v9l-9 5.25M3 7.5l9 5.25M3 7.5v9l9 5.25m0-9v9"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cube.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m21 7.5-9-5.25L3 7.5m18 0-9 5.25m9-5.25v9l-9 5.25M3 7.5l9 5.25M3 7.5v9l9 5.25m0-9v9"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#fde047" points="20,16 22,22 28,22 23,26 25,32 20,28 15,32 17,26 12,22 18,22" />
</svg>
